Name: Crate
Info: Has a chance to drop from slain enemies, and has a 20% to drop after a Tree is destroyed. Heals 3 HP when picked up.

Name: Legendary Crate
Info: Drops exclusively from Elites that spawn in Danger 2 and above & Bosses that spawn on wave 20. Doesn't drop from Elites and Bosses killed on later waves in Endless Mode. Always contains a Tier 4 Item. Heals 100HP.
